overall.description: First-person traversal through a dense cyberpunk metropolis at night, descending from high-rise rooftops through neon-lit corridors to street level. The footage showcases the futuristic architecture and vibrant holographic advertisements of Night City from Cyberpunk 2077, with dominant cyan and magenta neon lighting.

events.description: approaching the dense neon signage district, corridor narrows between buildings

agents.ego_description: carefully traversing narrow high-rise ledges and elevated walkways, looking down at street traffic multiple stories below

entered.detail: tall dark building facade with grid-patterned windows
concrete overpass structure with moving vehicle lights underneath
large circular pink neon sign with 'BRAIN WASH' text visible in the distance
multi-lane road visible several stories down with vehicle headlights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a narrow elevated walkway high above the city streets, traversing between modern skyscrapers. The camera moves steadily forward along the ledge with a view down to the traffic below, approaching a dense cluster of neon signage ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow neon-lit pedestrian corridor between high-rise buildings

events.description: entering enclosed corridor between buildings with dense vertical neon signage
descending ramp or stairs while continuing through the corridor

agents.ego_description: navigating through a tight corridor densely packed with glowing neon advertisements, descending toward lower city levels

entered.detail: large neon sign with 'CALIENTE' text and downward arrow
multiple vertical neon signs with Japanese characters
overhead monorail track structure running above the corridor

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a narrow canyon-like corridor between towering buildings, surrounded by dense layers of neon signage in multiple languages. The path descends gradually while passing under an elevated train track, with the 'CALIENTE' and 'PieZ' signs dominating the visual field.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower level pedestrian promenade overlooking street intersection

events.description: exiting narrow corridor to open promenade with palm trees and street view
view opens to busy intersection with moving vehicles and traffic lights

agents.ego_description: walking along a lower elevated walkway lined with palm trees, overlooking the street traffic and intersection below

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking along the street level below

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the edge of the walkway
green neon corporate sign for Orbital Air
busy road intersection with crosswalks and traffic signals

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the enclosed corridor onto a wider pedestrian promenade with palm trees, revealing a sweeping view of the street intersection below. The environment opens up to show the NCART station, Orbital Air signage, and busy street traffic, with the elevated monorail track now running along the left side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that descends from a high-altitude walkway into the dense, neon-saturated heart of a futuristic city. It begins by traversing a narrow elevated ledge between modern skyscrapers, moving steadily forward with a dizzying view of the traffic far below. As the camera approaches a cluster of glowing advertisements, the scene shifts into a narrow, canyon-like corridor where the path descends under an elevated train track amidst a barrage of multilingual neon signs like CALIENTE and PieZ. The environment then opens up as the camera emerges from the enclosed passage onto a wide pedestrian promenade lined with palm trees. Finally, the view expands to reveal a sweeping intersection featuring the NCART station and Orbital Air signage, with the monorail track now running alongside the busy street level.
